g.text: Subshell vs Brace Group: The Fork Boundary

ul.li: Use ( ) for Sandboxing: Temporary cd, environment overrides, or cleanup-sensitive tasks.
Use { } for Logic Grouping: Redirecting multiple commands to one file, or performance-critical loops.
Performance Note: Forking inside a large loop (e.g., 10k iterations) using subshells can degrade system responsiveness.
